'''''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' Premiere Issue''' was the first issue of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] magazine, published in [[October]] [[2002]] as part of the ''Star Wars Adventures'' membership kit along with the Adventure Guide and a notebook. The issue centered around [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The Ultimate Guide to ''Star Wars'' Episodes I to VI"
*"Hayden Christensen: All About Anakin"
*"Jedi Under Fire!"
*"Behind the Scenes: Making Yoda a Wise Warrior"
*"Who Said That?"
*Pull-out Poster
*"Attack in the Arena! You Are There!"
*"Jedi vs. Jango"
*"Masters of the Duel"
*"What's Your Episode II IQ?"
*"Attack of the Jokes"
*Answer Key
